Class ServiceRegistry

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api.ServiceRegistry
public final class ServiceRegistry extends Object
Resolves shared service implementations used across the application. Uses the initialization-on-demand holder pattern for thread-safe lazy initialization.

    Clears the cached room service so it is re-created on next access.

  • Method Details

    • getScheduleService

      public static ScheduleService getScheduleService()
      Returns the active schedule service instance.
      Returns:
      lazily initialized schedule service

    • getRoomService

      public static RoomService getRoomService()
      Returns the active room service instance.
      Returns:
      lazily initialized room service

    • getLogService

      public static LogService getLogService()
      Returns the active log service instance.
      Returns:
      lazily initialized log service (or test override if set)

    • setLogServiceForTesting

      public static void setLogServiceForTesting(LogService testLogService)
      Overrides the log service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.
      Parameters:
      testLogService - replacement log service instance

    • setScheduleServiceForTesting

      public static void setScheduleServiceForTesting(ScheduleService testScheduleService)
      Overrides the schedule service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.
      Parameters:
      testScheduleService - replacement schedule service instance

    • setRoomServiceForTesting

      public static void setRoomServiceForTesting(RoomService testRoomService)
      Overrides the room service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.

      Use this to inject a mock or test-specific RoomService implementation so that UI/controllers pick up the replacement via getRoomService().

      Parameters:
      testRoomService - replacement room service instance

    • getUserService

      public static UserService getUserService()
      Returns the active user service instance.
      Returns:
      lazily initialized user service

    • setUserServiceForTesting

      public static void setUserServiceForTesting(UserService testUserService)
      Overrides the user service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.
      Parameters:
      testUserService - replacement user service instance

    • getRuleService

      public static RuleService getRuleService()
      Returns the active rule service instance.
      Returns:
      lazily initialized rule service

    • setRuleServiceForTesting

      public static void setRuleServiceForTesting(RuleService testRuleService)
      Overrides the rule service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.
      Parameters:
      testRuleService - replacement rule service instance

    • getNotificationService

      public static NotificationService getNotificationService()
      Returns the active notification service instance. Delegates directly to JdbcNotificationService.getInstance() so that resetForTesting() is visible to all callers without holder-class caching.
      Returns:
      notification service (JDBC-backed for FR-12 persistence)

    • setNotificationServiceForTesting

      public static void setNotificationServiceForTesting(NotificationService svc)
      Overrides the notification service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.
      Parameters:
      svc - replacement notification service instance

    • getEnergyService

      public static EnergyService getEnergyService()
      Returns the active energy service instance.
      Returns:
      lazily initialized energy service

    • setEnergyServiceForTesting

      public static void setEnergyServiceForTesting(EnergyService testEnergyService)
      Overrides the energy service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.
      Parameters:
      testEnergyService - replacement energy service instance

    • getSceneService

      public static SceneService getSceneService()
      Returns the active scene service instance.
      Returns:
      lazily initialized scene service

    • setSceneServiceForTesting

      public static void setSceneServiceForTesting(SceneService svc)
      Overrides the scene service for tests or alternate runtime wiring.
      Parameters:
      svc - replacement scene service instance

    • resetForTesting

      public static void resetForTesting()
      Clears all test overrides, restoring the default service implementations. Intended for test lifecycle management where overrides must be cleared between tests.

    • resetRoomServiceForTesting

      public static void resetRoomServiceForTesting()
      Clears the cached room service so it is re-created on next access. This is intended for test lifecycle management where the singleton service instance must be reset between test cases.
